name: keystone-api-client

metadata.name: keystone-api-client
metadata.summary: Python client for the Keystone API

documentation:
# Keystone Python Client

Official Python client for ineracting with the Keystone API.

modules.name: keystone_client
documentation: A light-weight Python client for wrapping the Keystone API.

modules.name: keystone_client.schema
documentation: Schema objects used to define available API endpoints.

classes.name: keystone_client.schema.Endpoint

methods.name: keystone_client.schema.Endpoint.join_url
documentation:
Join the endpoint with a base URL.

This method returns URLs in a format that avoids trailing slash
redirects from the Keystone API.

Args:
    base: The base URL.
    *append: Partial paths to append onto the url.

Returns:
    The base URL join with the endpoint.
API endpoint agnostic to the baseAPI URL.

classes.name: keystone_client.schema.Schema
documentation: Schema defining the complete set of API endpoints.

modules.name: keystone_client.client
documentation:
Keystone API Client

This module provides a client class `KeystoneAPIClient` for interacting with the
Keystone API. It streamlines communication with the API, providing methods for
authentication, data retrieval, and data manipulation.

classes.name: keystone_client.client.HTTPClient

methods.name: keystone_client.client.HTTPClient.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the class.

Args:
    url: The base URL for a Keystone API server.

methods.name: keystone_client.client.HTTPClient.url
documentation: Return the server URL.

methods.name: keystone_client.client.HTTPClient.login
documentation:
Authenticate a new user session.

Args:
    username: The authentication username.
    password: The authentication password.
    timeout: Seconds before the request times out.

Raises:
    requests.HTTPError: If the login request fails.

methods.name: keystone_client.client.HTTPClient.logout
documentation:
Logout the current user session.

Args:
    timeout: Seconds before the blacklist request times out.

methods.name: keystone_client.client.HTTPClient.is_authenticated
documentation:
Query the server for the current session's authentication status.

Args:
    timeout: Seconds before the blacklist request times out.

methods.name: keystone_client.client.HTTPClient._csrf_headers
documentation: Return the CSRF headers for the current session

methods.name: keystone_client.client.HTTPClient._send_request
documentation:
Send an HTTP request.

Args:
    method: The HTTP method to use.
    data: JSON data to include in the POST request.
    endpoint: The complete url to send the request to.
    params: Query parameters to include in the request.
    timeout: Seconds before the request times out.

Returns:
    An HTTP response.

methods.name: keystone_client.client.HTTPClient.http_get
documentation:
Send a GET request to an API endpoint.

Args:
    endpoint: API endpoint to send the request to.
    params: Query parameters to include in the request.
    timeout: Seconds before the request times out.

Returns:
    The response from the API in the specified format.

Raises:
    requests.HTTPError: If the request returns an error code.

methods.name: keystone_client.client.HTTPClient.http_post
documentation:
Send a POST request to an API endpoint.

Args:
    endpoint: API endpoint to send the request to.
    data: JSON data to include in the POST request.
    timeout: Seconds before the request times out.

Returns:
    The response from the API in the specified format.

Raises:
    requests.HTTPError: If the request returns an error code.

methods.name: keystone_client.client.HTTPClient.http_patch
documentation:
Send a PATCH request to an API endpoint.

Args:
    endpoint: API endpoint to send the request to.
    data: JSON data to include in the PATCH request.
    timeout: Seconds before the request times out.

Returns:
    The response from the API in the specified format.

Raises:
    requests.HTTPError: If the request returns an error code.

methods.name: keystone_client.client.HTTPClient.http_put
documentation:
Send a PUT request to an endpoint.

Args:
    endpoint: API endpoint to send the request to.
    data: JSON data to include in the PUT request.
    timeout: Seconds before the request times out.

Returns:
    The API response.

Raises:
    requests.HTTPError: If the request returns an error code.

methods.name: keystone_client.client.HTTPClient.http_delete
documentation:
Send a DELETE request to an endpoint.

Args:
    endpoint: API endpoint to send the request to.
    timeout: Seconds before the request times out.

Returns:
    The API response.

Raises:
    requests.HTTPError: If the request returns an error code.
Low level API client for sending standard HTTP operations.

classes.name: keystone_client.client.KeystoneClient

methods.name: keystone_client.client.KeystoneClient.api_version
documentation: Return the version number of the API server.

methods.name: keystone_client.client.KeystoneClient.__new__
documentation: Dynamically create CRUD methods for each data endpoint in the API schema.

methods.name: keystone_client.client.KeystoneClient._create_factory
documentation: Factory function for data creation methods.

methods.name: keystone_client.client.KeystoneClient._retrieve_factory
documentation: Factory function for data retrieval methods.

methods.name: keystone_client.client.KeystoneClient._update_factory
documentation: Factory function for data update methods.

methods.name: keystone_client.client.KeystoneClient._delete_factory
documentation: Factory function for data deletion methods.
Client class for submitting requests to the Keystone API.
